---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve and fix errors.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or output log snippets (especially stack traces with Correlation IDs) to help explain your problem.

## Environment Details

- **OS / Platform**: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Python Version**: [e.g. 3.13.2]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 22.14.0]
- **Docker Compose Status**: [e.g. Local compose up, Kubernetes]
